description: Same conference with early-bird registration vs regular email - should match

content_parts.text:
You are comparing calendar events to detect duplicates.

**New Event:**
- Title: TechSummit 2026
- Start: 2026-09-15T09:00:00
- End: 2026-09-17T17:00:00
- Location: Moscone Center, San Francisco
- Description: Registration confirmed! Three days of cutting-edge tech talks and networking.

**Existing Events (same date):**

1. Event ID: event-001
   - Title: TechSummit Conference
   - Start: 2026-09-15T09:00:00
   - End: 2026-09-17T17:00:00
   - Location: Moscone Center, SF
   - Description: Early bird tickets available! Sept 15-17.

2. Event ID: event-002
   - Title: Code Review Session
   - Start: 2026-09-15T10:00:00
   - End: 2026-09-15T11:00:00
   - Location: Office
   - Description: Weekly code review

3. Event ID: event-003
   - Title: Dinner with Alex
   - Start: 2026-09-15T19:00:00
   - End: 2026-09-15T21:00:00
   - Location: The Garden Restaurant
   - Description: Catch up dinner

**Question:** Is the new event the same as any of the existing events?

Consider events the same if they refer to the same real-world event, even if:
- Wording is slightly different
- One has more details than the other
- Time changed slightly (updates)

Return the matching Event ID (or null if no match) and brief reasoning.
